body.title: CLOSED: Wire ADC performance-point stopwatch into SWADL base automation
body.description:
Wire python_diagnostic_base_class stopwatch into SWADL's SWADLBaseAutomation. Gate on T-python-diagnostic-base-class-repo and T-adc-performance-points.

**Logging backend:** loguru (via python_diagnostic_base_class). Same TaggedLogger and PerformanceHandler as ADC — consistent perf CSV format across both frameworks.

SWADLBaseAutomation inherits (or composes) DiagnosticBase from the micro-package, gaining self.stopwatch(), self.logger.perf(), and the full tagged logging interface.

**Affected files:** swadl/SWADL/engine/swadl_base.py, swadl/SWADL/engine/swadl_base_automation.py, requirements.txt
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; imports from python_diagnostic_base_class only
**Scope boundary:** wiring only — no flows instrumented in this ticket
**Test plan:** SWADLBaseAutomation exposes self.stopwatch() and self.logger.perf(); smoke test timing a no-op block writes CSV row
